chosen_logo.why: Official Schema.org Organization.logo URL declared in JSON-LD on every page (Corporation + Organization @types both reference the same hash). It is a vector wordmark, currentColor-flippable, and matches the visible 'TIFFANY & CO.' wordmark in every shot.png header.

brand_primary.name: tiffany-blue
brand_primary.evidence: Iconic 'Tiffany Blue' (Pantone 1837 / 'Robin's Egg Blue'). Visible as the persistent top promo banner across home/world-of-tiffany/high-jewelry/jewelry/love-engagement/press, and also the hover/accent chord on press.tiffany.com header. Color value cross-referenced to public PMS 1837 (#009CAD published by Tiffany).

brand_secondary.name: tiffany-paper
brand_secondary.evidence: Footer background rgb(251,249,247) computed on designers-collections/footer; appears as the primary off-white surface across product grid pages — warmer than pure white, the brand's signature 'paper'.

ink.name: ink
ink.evidence: computed body color rgb(0,0,0) across every page; Tiffany ALWAYS uses pure black for type, never softened grey. CTA backgrounds also rgb(0,0,0).

paper.name: paper
paper.evidence: Pure white used on overlays (cookie modal, sub-modal panels) and product card bg; secondary paper ground.

accents.name: graphite
accents.evidence: Body copy darker tone seen in editorial paragraphs on world-of-tiffany; subtle separation from pure black for long-form.

accents.name: rule
accents.evidence: Frequency #C1C1C1 = 25 in CSS color frequency dump; used as the 1px hairline divider between sections — Tiffany's restrained 'editorial rule'.

accents.name: verdure
accents.evidence: Frequency #6CC04A and #346E4A appear in checkout/availability flows; semantic positive accent (in-stock / verified).

accents.name: alert
accents.evidence: Frequency #E50739; semantic negative (out of stock / error).

display_font.evidence: Computed [class*='hero' i] uses 'Sterling SSM, Sterling Fallback, serif' weight 325 size 20px. Counted 18 occurrences (font.frequencies). Sterling is Tiffany's licensed Didone display face, used exclusively for the wordmark + editorial hero headlines.

body_font.evidence: computed_primary = ['Santral Book', 'Verdana']; appears in body, header, nav, h1 (40px weight 500), button. 32 occurrences in font.frequencies — the workhorse face.

weight_for_emphasis.evidence: btn-primary uses 'Santral Semibold' 11px tracked uppercase; explicit semibold cut for CTAs and small caps lockups. 15 occurrences.

spacing_radius_shadow.evidence: Every computed surface (body/header/nav/h1/buttons/btn-primary/footer) returns radius:0px AND shadow:none. CTA padding 32×22 (large horizontal) signals airy. Footer padY:96px confirms generous vertical breathing room across hero/section transitions.

precedents: Hermès print catalogues (uppercase Didone wordmark + airy product photography)
modern Bottega Veneta web (radius:0 + monochrome + restraint)

notes: Tiffany Blue (#009CAD / PMS 1837) is the brand's most powerful trademark — the colour itself is registered. It MUST appear as a deliberate, restrained chord on every cover slide, never as a generic 'accent'. Use it like Hermès uses Hermès Orange.

Sterling SSM is a proprietary licensed face. The DS will use a Didone fallback (Bodoni / Didot / Georgia) and document the trade-off; runtime decks should use the closest free Didone (Playfair Display + Cormorant Garamond as Sterling-adjacent web alternatives).

Tiffany typography is markedly UPPERCASE-traced for the wordmark + nav (TIFFANY & CO., GIFTS, HIGH JEWELRY, JEWELRY) — sentence case is reserved for body/editorial. The DS should bake this into the type-pairing rule.
Sharp 0-radius everything is non-negotiable Tiffany — soft-rounded chrome would read as fast-fashion.
